project.title: Fintech Analytics Dashboard
project.subtitle: Real-time financial analytics dashboard with regulatory compliance, risk monitoring and multi-bank integration

objectives.title: Real-time portfolio visibility
objectives.description: Provide real-time visibility into portfolio performance, asset allocation and P&L across all managed accounts.

objectives.title: Regulatory compliance automation
objectives.description: Automate compliance reporting for SEC, FINRA and SOX requirements with audit trails and automated alerts.

objectives.title: Risk monitoring and alerts
objectives.description: Implement real-time risk monitoring with configurable thresholds, VaR calculations and automated alert escalation.

objectives.title: Multi-bank data aggregation
objectives.description: Aggregate transaction and position data from multiple banking partners through secure API integrations.

scope_blocks.title: Dashboard and Analytics
scope_blocks.short_description: Interactive real-time dashboard with portfolio analytics, risk metrics and customizable reporting
scope_blocks.long_description: Feature-rich analytics dashboard with real-time data visualization, interactive charts for portfolio performance, asset allocation breakdowns, P&L tracking, risk heatmaps, configurable widgets and exportable reports in PDF and Excel formats. Supports role-based views for portfolio managers, risk analysts and compliance officers.

detailed_features.title: Portfolio analytics engine
detailed_features.description: Real-time calculation of portfolio metrics including returns, Sharpe ratio, drawdown, and benchmark comparison with interactive time-series charts.

detailed_features.title: Custom report builder
detailed_features.description: Drag-and-drop report builder allowing users to compose reports from pre-built widgets, schedule automated generation and distribution via email.

scope_blocks.title: Backend and API
scope_blocks.short_description: High-performance API with real-time data processing, multi-bank integration and event-driven architecture
scope_blocks.long_description: Backend architecture designed for low-latency financial data processing with event-driven pipeline for real-time updates, RESTful and WebSocket APIs, integration layer for multiple banking APIs (Plaid, Yodlee), transaction reconciliation engine and comprehensive audit logging for regulatory compliance.
features: Rate limiting and API key management

detailed_features.title: Data aggregation pipeline
detailed_features.description: Kafka-based pipeline that ingests, normalizes and enriches financial data from multiple sources with exactly-once processing guarantees.

detailed_features.title: Reconciliation engine
detailed_features.description: Automated transaction reconciliation across bank feeds with exception handling, manual review workflow and audit trail.

scope_blocks.title: Security and Compliance
scope_blocks.short_description: Enterprise-grade security layer with encryption, access control, audit trails and regulatory reporting
scope_blocks.long_description: Comprehensive security infrastructure with AES-256 encryption at rest and TLS 1.3 in transit, OAuth 2.0 with MFA, role-based access control with field-level permissions, immutable audit logs, automated compliance report generation for SEC and FINRA, and penetration testing certification.
features: Role-based access control with field-level permissions
Automated SEC and FINRA compliance reports

detailed_features.title: Access control framework
detailed_features.description: Fine-grained RBAC with field-level permissions, IP whitelisting, session management and automated access reviews.

detailed_features.title: Compliance reporting engine
detailed_features.description: Automated generation of regulatory reports with configurable templates, scheduling, and secure distribution to compliance stakeholders.

roadmap_phases.name: Phase 1: Analysis and Architecture
roadmap_phases.description: Requirements analysis, compliance gap assessment, security architecture design, infrastructure planning and UI prototypes.

roadmap_phases.name: Phase 2: Core Development
roadmap_phases.description: Development of backend API, data aggregation pipeline, dashboard frontend and bank integrations.

roadmap_phases.name: Phase 3: Security and Launch
roadmap_phases.description: Security implementation, compliance automation, penetration testing, performance optimization and production deployment.

items.name: Requirements analysis and compliance assessment
items.description: Stakeholder interviews, regulatory requirements mapping, compliance gap analysis and technical architecture design.

items.name: Security architecture and UI design
items.description: Security architecture specification, threat modeling, infrastructure design and high-fidelity UI prototypes.

items.name: Backend API development
items.description: Go-based REST and WebSocket API, event-driven pipeline with Kafka, data models and comprehensive test coverage.

items.name: Dashboard frontend development
items.description: React dashboard with D3.js charts, AG Grid tables, real-time WebSocket updates and responsive layout.

items.name: Multi-bank API integration
items.description: Integration with Plaid and Yodlee APIs, data normalization, transaction reconciliation and error handling.

items.name: Real-time analytics engine
items.description: Portfolio analytics calculations, risk metrics (VaR, Sharpe), report generation engine and scheduled exports.

items.name: Security implementation and audit
items.description: Encryption, OAuth 2.0 with MFA, RBAC, immutable audit logs, penetration testing coordination and remediation.

items.name: Compliance automation and deployment
items.description: Automated SEC/FINRA reporting, SOC 2 preparation documentation, performance optimization and production deployment.

team_members.description: Senior architect with experience in financial systems, event-driven architectures and regulatory compliance.
Senior backend engineer with Go, Kafka and financial data processing experience.
Senior frontend engineer specialized in data visualization, D3.js and real-time dashboards.
Security specialist with experience in fintech compliance, encryption and access control frameworks.
Quality engineer with experience in financial software testing, security testing and regulatory validation.
Project manager with fintech delivery experience and understanding of regulatory timelines.

included_services: Weekly status meetings and progress reports

quote.notes: All prices are in USD and exclude applicable taxes. Third-party service costs (Auth0, Plaid, Yodlee, cloud infrastructure) are not included and will be contracted directly by the client. Penetration testing will be conducted by a certified third-party firm; coordination is included but the testing fee is billed separately.
quote.terms: This proposal is valid for 30 calendar days from the issue date. Timeline estimates assume timely client feedback within 3 business days for each review cycle. Scope changes will be assessed and quoted separately through a formal change request process. All deliverables are subject to mutual acceptance criteria defined during Phase 1.
